description_long: This is a three-story brick apartment building with a flat roof, featuring a prominent cylindrical rooftop water tower and a small rooftop utility structure. The facade is lined with large, evenly spaced rectangular windows framed by stone lintels and sills, emitting a warm yellow glow as if illuminated from within. Metal fire escape stairs run along one side of the building, providing emergency access between floors and to the ground. Air conditioning units are mounted beneath several windows, and a large vertical drainpipe runs down one corner of the structure. The main entrance is accessed by a short set of steps and is flanked by a small landing. The building sits on a rectangular concrete base, suggesting an urban sidewalk or street setting.
description: A three-story brick apartment building with a rooftop water tower, fire escape stairs, and large glowing windows. The structure features a main entrance, air conditioning units, and a flat roof with utility access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, large windows, rooftop water tower, and utility structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal fire escape stairs, air conditioning units, and window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the rooftop structures, more air conditioning units, and the absence of a main entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear view of the vertical drainpipe and brickwork, minimal windows and no fire escape.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on each floor, with consistent spacing and alignment across the facade. Each floor features multiple large rectangular windows grouped evenly, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance.
